reviews.review_description: This is the best racing game on quest. This game actually allowed me to stretch my legs and put my on track skills to use. The updates have been phenomenal and I can’t wait to see this game grow. It’s so great to be apart of such a community. The only complaints I have is that the details of the tracks are moderately inconsistent. Either way, ￼keep up the fantastic work :3￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the awesome feedback, it means a lot! 🏁

We’re really glad you’re enjoying the experience and being part of the community. Noted on the track detail consistency. We’ll keep refining it as we go. Appreciate the support! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
I got me the game now, i am 62 and did not have time yet to race in it.
I wil add my review later but want to give it 5 stars already because you devs are listening and responding to alot of opinions and are verry active to update and make it even better. This i cant say from alot of other devs in other games. So Thank you for it A+++++
Regards and greetings, Jean from the Netherlands.

Yeah Max haha.

developer_response.body: Hi Jean, thanks for your kind words! We’re also thrilled that you’re from the same country as Max Verstappen, who’s definitely one of our favorite drivers!

reviews.review_description:
There are not many driving games on Quest, but to date this is my absolute favourite one.
It has that F1 feel to it without being an official F1 game.
The engines sound so authentic and have race roar.
Speed feels incredible and the long straights fly by in a flash.
Handling is spot on, hit a bend too fast and completely spin out, to much thumping of the steering wheel just like real F1.
The EV mode is a nice touch and a great addition. The tracks look really nice, not that you have much time to sight see.
An absolute steller driving race game.
Top of the leaderboard for me.

developer_response.body: And this is just the beginning for us, thank you for your honest review! Can't wait to see you all in a couple of weeks. 🏆

reviews.review_description: The absolute best racing experience so far on the Meta Quest. The immersion, sense of speed, buttery smooth controls and frame rate are top notch. I can't wait until multiplayer is released!

developer_response.body: Thank you Tbone, new & exciting stuff are coming soon!

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing RaceClub on Meta Quest, and it’s honestly one of the most fun arcade-style racing experiences in VR right now.

Choose between E cars or V12 currently 4 tracks with more to be released! It’s got to be the best F1 racing game on standalone hands down! 

The sense of speed is fantastic you really feel like you’re flying down the track. The car handling strikes a great balance between realistic and accessible, so it’s easy to pick up but still rewarding to master. Tracks are well designed, with enough variety to keep things interesting, and the visuals are sharp and smooth on Quest.

What really stands out is how immersive the driving feels in VR. Looking into corners, judging distances, and reacting in real time makes it way more engaging than flat-screen racing games, the counter steering is awesome.  Multiplayer is going to be a blast when it’s released. 

There’s still room for growth  more cars and tracks would be amazing but the core gameplay is solid and already delivers a great experience.

If you enjoy racing games and want something that really shows off VR speed and immersion, RaceClub is definitely worth checking out. 🚗🔥

developer_response.body:
Thank you Tom, it's great to have you here, and we really appreciate your thoughts! We have many new features and content planned for the future, and planning to release a public roadmap soon!

We'll see you at the podium. 😉

reviews.review_description:
Great game for time trials and will be amazing when multiplayer comes out 
Highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words, it really motivates us :D

reviews.review_description: Such a great racing game, please add race mode and more car models. Would appreciate it if you added real tracks. Thanks for the great game!

developer_response.body: Thank you kinger2311, we really appreciate the kind words! When it comes to real tracks, since they all have licenses, sadly we can not afford them as of right now. 😅 But we are working on some unique & new tracks for RACECLUB!

reviews.review_title: Great. Could use one slight adjustment
reviews.review_description:
Brilliant game that should please every vr non pc petrol head.
Any chance the developers  could make the racing line have an option to only be visable on corners?
That would push it to the 5 stars.

developer_response.body: Hello lesbell, we've also seen your feedback on our Discord and let the team know about it. Thank you very much for your kind words & suggestion. <3

reviews.review_title: One of the best Quest racing experiences
reviews.review_description:
Update:
With the latest version the features which I‘ve mentioned below are included, so: here‘s the fifth star!


Original Review:
Even though early access is limited to time trials at the moment it is one of the best racing experiences on the Quest and it feels incredible realistic. Graphics and sound are great as well!

I am looking forward to the new game modes and tracks.

There are a few additional wishes which would be easy to implement and which would lead to the fifth star:
- Customizable HUB. At least it should be possible to deactivate the HUB completely in favor of immersion.
- Rumble can’t be deactivated and the controllers are constantly vibrating which is draining the batteries…
- The speed traps should be optional! I don’t care about them and the sound of them is very annoying and distracting.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the thoughtful review and for updating it. We are really glad to hear the latest version hit the mark for you. ⭐️

We appreciate you sharing those suggestions as well. Feedback like this helps us fine-tune the experience, and we’ll keep working on improving immersion and customization as we move forward. See you on the track! 🏁

reviews.review_description: For a new game this is great fun, that has loads of potential to be really successful. The sense of speed is great, graphics are good, with really smooth game play. The thing they've done really well is the feeling that u actually get, its like your holding a steering wheel with a slight feeling of ffb,  just by holding 2 controllers up. Dont get me wrong this is not like sim racing in vr on the  pc when u get the rig out with your wheel and pedals, but wow they've really done a good job with this game.Yes the game is bare bones atm with some features turned off, but with multiplayer on the horizon and tracks to be unlocked im really excited to see where this game can go.

developer_response.body: We have a long way to go gunnerandy! But we are really happy to hear that you are already having fun - cheers to more podiums for you soon!

reviews.review_description: A couple months ago I decided to get multiple racing games. All of them either looked nothing like the game in was shown or felt like realife. That was when I got race club vr. This game really makes me feel like I'm not in vr but in real life. The handling and optional assists really help for if your new or if your experienced. This is the game I always wanted. Thank you to the devs

reviews.review_title: The F1 of Quest racing games
reviews.review_description:
Wow… just WOW!!

This is just incredible!! The graphics, sound, handling, sense of speed… puts this in pole position!

There’s lots of options for customisation… from the controls to the paint jobs on cars.

There’s zero motion sickness when you whizzing around the track… how did they do it?! 

It’s just so immersive… the feel of how the car handles on track and the sense of speed is something no others have captured in their racing games. Even the engine sounds are so great!! 

It’s still early days for this incredible racer… with a roadmap of more stuff down the road.

For now you race against ghosts on the track.. friends, the world best or your own.. but it’s just so addictive trying to better the times and be the best of the best.

You MUST get this one!! Highly recommended!!!! GET IT!!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much, we really appreciate your honest feedback! ❤️ Get ready for more because this is just the beginning.

reviews.review_title: This is a game I needed
reviews.review_description:
I love racing sims I play F1 25 all the time and I was making a league with my friends on formula X but then they stoped updating so I knew we had to find a different game so I was looking up games and I heard about this game and now I play it all the time and am revamping the league with my friends with costume teams and everything I love this game so much ( also idea for a future update were you can switch tires and have a wether system for the rain tires and heck for the snowy track you could make costume snow tires and also the tires deteriorate overtime) keep working hard on this amazing game can’t wait until multiplayer comes out  
￼

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your excitement and kind words, we are really excited for the future of RACECLUB as well. We have many cool ideas already on our roadmap!

reviews.review_description:
I didn’t know what to expect but this game is so much more fun than I imagined.

The developers have found the sweet spot of realistic AND fun.

I get sucked into playing until my headset battery dies.

It sounds like there is a great update roadmap too so I’ll be enjoying this game for a long time.

It’s currently underpriced for what you get!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! We have many exciting updates in the future; keep your eyes peeled. 👀

reviews.review_description:
I can't believe how great this is. It's very fluid it's very very realistic. I love the options on the steering wheel. I still am getting used to grabbing them correctly but I'm sure that'll get better. 

I can't believe how smooth everything is. I'm wondering is it already on 120 hz or do you have to have it hooked up to the PC for that? I really bought the game because I heard of the 120 hz experimental thing but.... I'm not sure if it's on or not. 

anyway I love the game though it is fantastic and I can't wait for more. The four stages are great but four more would be even better. 
also, I know that there's the guided line but if you guys wanted to add more content I know that I personally would love some kind of training to actually learn how to take turns and be a formula 1 driver. 
Just a suggestion.
Bello

developer_response.body: Hello, thank you for your kind review! :)

reviews.review_description: Listen, I'm no professional formula 1 driver but this game is so dang close to being it. I've played enough simulations to know a great racing game, this is a great racing game. You guys did an amazing job with this one. Only things that i would like added is later on: different car styles, personal preference tuning, tires have more grip or just different tires that fit the preference of the driver, miles per hour (mph) option, and gloves on the hands. And later on when all priorities of the game are done, I’d look into adding in smaller horsepower options for younger drivers learning to race and a custom multiplayer lobby system for those who just want to play with friends and family. Thank you for your time, keep up the great work and you definitely deserve an award or something for this game.

developer_response.body: Hey there! We're glad you enjoyed the game, and thank you for your valuable suggestions!

reviews.review_description: This is the best race sim on quest hands down. I am a Grid legends fan and this is better. The graphics and driving dynamics is amazing. The controller vibrations and sounds are fantastic. I can’t wait until the other tracks are released.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much bignycdon, we are super glad to hear that you're having fun. <3

reviews.review_description:
There are games that show speed, and then there are games that make you feel it deep inside you. RACEclub is not just a Formula 1 VR game. It feels like a love letter to racing, to focus, to that thin line between control and losing it all.

The moment you put the headset on, everything else fades away. You are not sitting in your room anymore. You are in the driver’s seat. The cockpit feels alive around you. Lights flicker, the engine hums, and every small movement connects you to the car. Then the lights go out, and your heart jumps with it.

What makes RACEclub special is not only how real it looks, but how real it feels. Corners are not just turns. They are choices. You lean into them without thinking, your hands tight, your mind focused. The track is not something you just follow. It is something you fight with, learn, and slowly understand.

At full speed, everything around you starts to blur, but your mind becomes clearer. You begin to feel when to brake, when to push, when to take a risk. Hitting a perfect corner feels amazing, like everything came together for just a moment.

The game does not pretend you are perfect. You will make mistakes. You will spin out. You will push too hard and lose control. That is part of what makes it so powerful. Every mistake makes you want to try again, to do better, to get just a little faster.

What stays with you is not just the gameplay, but the feeling. It reminds you why racing is exciting in the first place. Not just to win, but to feel something real.

RACEclub does not just let you play racing.

It lets you feel it.

Edit:
I've dropped this down to a 1 star. It's been out fir a good number of weeks and they still leave the analogue control in an unplayable state despite advertising it as a selling point, the very point I purchased it for. Not only is the analogue thumbstick control awful and unresponsive, so ate the brake and throttle in this mode. They are 10000% different to the silly virtual cockpit. If you're serious about making a racing game, add actual wheel support. 


When they say this is early access, it's literally the definition. This is very losely a game. There is only one track available.

Many of the in game options are not yet online or available.

The big draw for this game when I initially saw the trailer was the ability to use analogue thumbstick control for steering. Why people think it's a good idea to try and hold your arms in mid air  for any length of time which is what the virtual control requires, is beyond me.

The big problem is that the analogue control is terrible, unusable. So despite it's inclusion you cannot use it if you wish to be competitive. When using virtual controls the car is nimble and agile, pedal response sharp. With analogue stick it's like trying to paddle a boat in toffee. Laughable. The perfect line of the track shows green I dictating you can take it at speed, and in virtual setting you absolutely can. Switch to analogue and the steering is so far off you have to lift and brake everywhere thst you shouldn't be. When using analogue my lap times are six seconds slower at the best. This is totally unacceptable. Also, for some reason in analogue steering mode the pedals do not respond like they do in virtual, they're almost all or nothing, as though they aren't analogue at all.

Why are your hands ghosted? They should be actusl realistic race gloves, just like every other game. Also, when using analogue you have no hands at all, why? Why even make it different. Utterly stupid. 

A great suggestion would be to get someone to design you a steering wheel 3D print peripheral that the Quest controllers can sit in. At least then you'd have far greater accuracy and save on arm fatigue. Better still add wheel support, the Quest can do it, it's already been done on another f1 game. 

The heads up display is a cluttered mess that fills your vision and cannot be switched off or fine tuned. This needs to change. The course map should also show you exactly where you are on course, or else, why have it? This was a feature on home computers forty years ago. 

Engine note is pretty good, sounds solid but needs some tweaking at high speed. It should whine more, it's too harsh. A minor issue.

Graphics are good. Clean and stable, no pop up or jaggy edges that I've witnessed. It would be cool to have for and aft plus height adjust for the cockpit view. It feels a little too close as is. 
I like the customisation of your cars livery. It would be great if you added a folder that could be accessed via pc to add our own logos.  Maybe even have a team function where you and a friend can race the same livery.

This game has the potential to be something very special, but the fundamentals need to be in place first. 

I look forward to updates.

developer_response.body: We're sorry you gave us a negative review. We encourage you to try the game with the analogue control again, as we released a major update on March 7 that significantly improved the car's handling with the stick. You also mentioned that there's only one track available in the game; please try the game again, as there are actually 5 tracks available, so you can try the others. We hope you’ll change your mind about the game. Thank you

reviews.review_description:
RaceClub offers an excellent, immersive VR racing experience focused on precision and lap times.
With two types of cars (electric or internal combustion) inspired by Formula 1 and two perfectly mastered control modes (stick for arcade-style gameplay with multiple camera views, or steering wheel control in an immersive cockpit for a sim-like experience), the game offers a perfect balance between simulation and accessibility.
With polished graphics, challenging game modes and tracks, and vehicle customization, the only things missing are a multiplayer mode and more tracks to make it a near-perfect title.
Brilliant gameplay delivers pure driving pleasure!
A promising title for players who love mastering tracks and perfecting their performance. The future benchmark for standalone racing games is sure to be a hit.

This is an absolute blast. If you’ve been craving real, competitive circuit racing in VR, this delivers in a big way.
The driving feels tight, responsive, and genuinely skill-based. You can’t just throw the car into corners and hope for the best — braking points matter, racing lines matter, and consistency wins races. It gives you that proper “one more race” feeling because you know you can shave another tenth off your lap time.  And its great ‘ghost driving’ yourself or your mates
Whether driving F1 V12 or Formula E they both come with a different feel. The sense of speed in VR is fantastic. Sitting in the cockpit, judging distances, battling side-by-side — it feels intense in the best way. When you nail a clean overtake or defend your line through a tight corner, it’s incredibly satisfying.
And what is really important a lot of games I get motion sickness but NOT this one, not at all for me!!!
This is a must-have. Competitive, immersive, and seriously addictive.

developer_response.body: We are really happy to hear that you are enjoying the game. Keep playing RaceClub thanks.

reviews.review_description: Really well polished racing game. Reminds me a little of virtua racing. Would love to see more fantasy type tracks with interesting scenery/backdrops. Time of day choices would be great and maybe the addition of some extra effects - sparks and smoke to give everything a bit more life. But excellent game so far thanks!

This game really surprised me on how fun it was. Before I knew it my battery was dead on the headset because I couldn't put it down! The sense of speed and adrenaline you get from being in the cockpit of the car is fantastic! Handling feels great and the sense of speed on straight aways is phenomenal. I only played the first course this far. I'm trying to move up the ranking board. At the moment I'm at 31st. Also, the sound in the game is very impressive. You really feel the power of the car your driving. The scary part is the game is already this good and this is just the begining! Once they add live multiplayer and more tracks, etc this game has a very, very bright future! If your a racing fan you gotta give this game a shot. This game along with V hoverbike are the best racing games on quest by far! Great job to the developers. Keep up the good work!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, seeing everyone enjoying RACECLUB was one of our goals, and it will just keep getting better from here as you said! 🏎️

More updates are coming soon!

reviews.review_title: I have the need for speed.
reviews.review_description:
And this game delivers it in spades! Looks like we're a bit early on things but I'm having a lot of fun just hotlapping and climbing the leaderboard!

Devs: Well done! I'd love to see an option for the hotlap / duel part to pick your friends' ghosts instead of the one directly above you. Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much Malys, and great suggestion too!

reviews.review_description:
I’m not the biggest racing fan, but every now and then a game comes along that really grabs me. VRacer Hoverbike is the last one to really grab me, but thankfully RaceClub ended the drought.  

The key to racers (esp in VR) is find the right balance between Arcade & Realism. Make it too realistic and most people will find it less accessible. Make it too arcadey and turn off the realistic fans.  Thankfully this game nails it PERFECTLY.  The controls are crisp and responsive. The gameplay loop is suprisingly addictive seeing as it only offers ghost time trials. But multiplayer has already been announced and once it’s added RC is gonna be bananas.  

If you’re still on the fence about purchasing, here’s my unsolicited advice: it’s $12 today. Same as a Big Mac and fries. Buy it, and if you don’t like it, just return it. But I guarantee you the price is gonna eventually increase, especially once more features/tracks are added.  I can see this going as high as $30 so my suggestion is take the chance today rather than waiting. 

Great job devs! You created a banger

developer_response.body: Thank you PowPow55, we really appreciate it! Thanks for notifying us about the Quest Pro controllers issue again, happy to see that you're having a great time. <3

reviews.review_description:
Honestly the best racing game I’ve played for a stand alone quest racing game. The controls feel amazing and the vibrations actually make it feel like I’m holding the wheel and driving the car (something I haven’t seen with other stand alone quest racing games) 

It’s still new, so only hot laps/ “ghost” car racing, but plans to add real racing so definitely excited for that. Would be really cool if they added real race tracks from the world (spa, silver-stone, Vegas,Nurburgring?, etc) but the tracks are definitely good as they are and have a nice flow to it. 

Needs multiplayer as well but I assume that’ll come with future updates

Like i said great game at last a car racing game
 thats feels good to control and im a vracer veteran who races everyday only thing that is wrong is no multiplayer which is a big issue as i know i couldve got at least 10 copys sold today i hope this gets sorted asap love the sounds of the cars and look of the game will give 5 stars as soon as multiplayer drops😀 again guys get that multi sorted as I've got players waiting for it before they will buy it!!!

developer_response.body: We are already working on the Multiplayer update and we are also really excited for it! Can't wait to see the race for the podium - thank you for the review!

reviews.review_title: Definitely lived up to the hype!
reviews.review_description: To start, I love this game. It really feels like i’m in an f1 car while playing but there are some things I don’t like. For starters it is WAY too easy to drift, also even though you have it as an option, I can’t ￼change from KPH to MPH, and the turning is a little too sensitive in my opinion. Over all though, definitely a good game especially for releasing only about a week ago.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and suggestions. We are working to enhance the overall gaming experience, and you will soon be able to switch to MPH.

reviews.review_description: This has been a really fun surprise. It’s not trying to be a super serious racing simulator, and I actually like that about it. The controls are easy to pick up, so you can just jump in and start racing without spending forever learning complicated mechanics. It runs smoothly and looks good, with colourful tracks and a nice sense of speed. RaceClub is definitely worth checking out.

reviews.review_title: This game will be EPIC with time.
reviews.review_description:
For early access this game has a lot going for it. 
The physics are solid and the sense of speed is great. 
The handling is really good now, not sim like and not too arcadey, just right and unique to this game. 
Currently only 4 tracks and just hot lap leaderboard and ghosts to race. No career as yet.
But it's a great start. 

Things I would like to see. 

Basic screen space reflection, or simple texture map to give the impression of a shine to the cars.

Currently it seems like the opponents cars wheels don't spin, there's no sparks, and from what I remember there's no shadow under the cars, which I feel could be added quite easily. For sparks just white lines that need to randomly animate to give the illusion of sparks at certain points around the track. 
And for shadows, just a faded spot shadow would work. 

Obviously multiplayer is a big deal and necessary.

A career mode, just a simple one made up of all the tracks in the game. And give the option for at least 24 lap races. 

And obviously fix the little bugs like the drifting of the hands on the steering wheel. I don't feel you should have to grab the wheel but your hands just stick to it when you spawn in. That way the controllers will work however anyone rests their hands. You could at least have the option to toggle free hands or locked position. If that makes sense. 

But all in a a great game and I hope it does well.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review Russ_Blake, appreciate the time you took to post! We are already working on many new features, tracks and bug fixes. Especially some of the critical bugs reported by our community - we already fixed them in our next update!

We are always open to feedback, but we also need to keep in mind that this is a standalone game, and we need to maintain stable performance before adding some potential performance decreasing features like shadows, etc. But of course, we are already investigating!

reviews.review_title: Worth every penny even in bare state
reviews.review_description: Could do with some graphic enhancements and definitely more content but even in its current state its worth it and its in active development so its only gonna get better

developer_response.body:
Really appreciate the honest feedback, that’s exactly where we’re at right now. 🙌

We’re actively working on visual improvements and adding more content over time, so you’ll definitely see things evolve with each update. Glad you’re enjoying it already, and thanks for being part of the journey!

reviews.review_description: You cant even race. You cant change camera angle at all. Controls are unforgiving and trash. Overall a horrible game that should have spent like 3 or 4 more months in the design studio and is lazily done.

developer_response.body: Hey Codyio, we’re really surprised by your feedback. The game features two driving modes: the main one is immersive, so the camera angle doesn’t change, and there’s a “Stick” mode that you can select from the “Driving Options,” which offers multiple camera angles. I encourage you to give the game another try. Otherwise, the game is an Early Access title that was released just a few weeks ago, and there’s certainly still a lot of work to be done. I invite you to join our Discord to follow updates on the game more closely: https://discord.gg/SJPKwujq2x

reviews.review_description: Not bad for a start. Cars with driving assistant on are still sliding easily, so u get out of the curves a lot. Even when srarting from  the rear tires start sliiding. They should make it like in F1, driving assistants on and u can keep the throttle down and stay in curves. Assistants off should be simulation driving. It has 2 cars and 4 curcuits only, but still its early access. A lot of option are still disabled at this given time. One of the cars is fuel, the other one is electric.  ur driving in the V12 racing class. Even better would be if u could adjust the driving assistants, for an example, ABS adjustable from 0% to 100%, and 100% is the level where the car stays compltely in line while keeping the throttle down. What should be done, adjusting driving assistants for always noobs like me, so we can keep the throttle down, much more cars and circuits. And they should make it no internet connection needed.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Cars with driving assistance on should still be able to drift/slide if you are not putting any effort and just throttling. 😅 We have different settings of assistance, some help you turn around the corners easily, some help you with the overall handling of the car. Those do not mean that the game will play on its own, they will help you learn the game though!

We'll see what we can improve overall, thank you very much for the feedback!

reviews.review_description:
this game so far is pretty cool and honestly very impressive. i wish the tires had more grip so it isn't that easy to drift into corners and lose time on the laps.              i don't know if this is a copyright issue or not but i kinda wish it was a real life tracks like f one tracks or gt3 tracks or anything like that.         the tracks in the game now are pretty cool the scenery is amazing but on some tracks it is very hard to know where the apex is are it's very easy to crash into the wall.  .          i really hope that the online racing will be  realistic with penalties,dnf and troll modders.       i wish you can remove some of the UI on the screen because it is very big and in the way. 

it would be kinda cool if there was like a halo like in f1. 

  last thing i kinda wish there was a entire section on explaining what like the knobs do 

thank you

developer_response.body:
Hello Huzar! When it comes to copyright issues, yes, circuits are indeed copyrighted and we can not just go ahead and add them to the game. 👀 But we recently added a new circuit, Miramonti, and it is well-received by the community so far! It has some real-life circuit vibes too. :P

Thank you for the suggestions for the Multiplayer and UI, we are indeed developing it as we speak, and can't wait to share more!

reviews.review_description: What a start for an early access game, this is going to be great. And the devs seem to be motivated as f. Love the new track, please more tracks with elevations.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We are more than happy to see our players' reactions to Miramonti - tracks with elevations are definitely something we can consider for the future, after the first impressions of our new circuit. 👀

reviews.review_description: Relatively new F1 fan since last year and this made me have even more respect for the drivers! Feels very realistic and challenging once you turn off the automatic settings. I’m improving my lap times any chance I get and I can’t wait for race mode!
Love this game, great sense of speed, cant wait to see what else them add to it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for this feedback and your kind words, means a lot!

reviews.review_description: This game is fun The graphics are good The sense of speed is good The steering  The staring is good we just need real gloves instead of ghost hands and is there any way we can race when we racing against the AI can it be real a cars instead of ghost cars

developer_response.body: Thank you very much midnight, hoping to see you on the track soon again!

reviews.review_description:
This game absolutely delivers when it comes to immersion and realistic handling. It makes me feel like im inside the car!! It has amazing updates and the developers are very active, cant wait for more!! 

Highly recommendddddddd 🤩

developer_response.body: Thank you very much hamada2923, appreciated! <3

reviews.review_description:
I was dubious about the controls but they are so intuitive!
Great sense of speed
It’s mainly only hotlapping atm but you get a great sense of racing with multiple ghosts you race against 👍🏻😁

Fantastic game, I know many people want wheel compatability or better thumb stick driving but I think the immersive controls are spot on and keep the playing field level for everyone. I would suggest more nuanced rumble though like various forza Xbox games have implemented.


Keep it up!!

developer_response.body: Thank you Shudderudder, we really appreciate your support! We are working on new and exciting stuff for you and can't wait to show it soon.

reviews.review_title: Very promising if filled with content
reviews.review_description: This is not a review for a finished game. It is currently in eary access and has maybe 5% of what it would make a complete game. The current content not even comes close to the (by far) best Quest racing game in terms of features, which is "Grid Legends". But what already works very well is the look and feel of the racing itself and that is the key to a good experience. This is worth 4/5 stars for this "demo" as it can be called. If the developers can pull off the content with storyline, single player racing season, weather and multiplayer this game can be a winner.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. RaceClub certainly has a long way to go, but we've only just started. Keep following us.

reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun the graphics are absolutely amazing. Feels so realistic like I’m actually in a race. I highly recommend this game 5 plus stars ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Good

developer_response.body: Thank you bob, glad to hear that you enjoyed!

reviews.review_title: It's a really good game for simulator
reviews.review_description: Realistic F1 feel... the sounds... the visuals are pretty good. There's only one track, no multiplayer, no actual racing. Just an endless loop of driving. I want to see an actual race, even if it's against yourself... with a set amount of laps... it would be nice if there was a pit for tire changes... there are some minor bugs. A few times I was racing against my own ghost car, and if she spun out... I would lose control for no reason... like... hmm... but all in all... solid A game with a lot of potential

developer_response.body: Hey there! Thanks for your review and suggestions! If you encountered a bug, please join our Discord server and report it here: https://discord.gg/SJPKwujq2x. Also, bear in mind that there are five racetracks available in the game — check them out! Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Cheers from an actual Formula pilot!
reviews.review_description:
RaceClub is one of those VR games that just clicks from the first minute. The driving feels smooth, immersive, and FUN, you can tell a lot of care went into getting the experience right!

What I loved most is how easy it is to jump in and enjoy, but still feel challenged as you improve. It strikes a great balance between arcade and realism, inwhich makes it perfect whether you’re playing casually or trying to push your limits.

Super engaging, great sense of speed, and just overall a really solid VR driving experience. Definitely one I keep coming back to.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Triplemick, we are really happy to hear your experience!

Actual Formula pilot you say? We need to talk, please join our Discord and send us a message! 👀

-> https://discord.gg/SJPKwujq2x
